content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:Star_by_Star_Cover.jpg|thumb|200px|''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' is released in October 2001, marking the death of a major [[Star Wars Legends|EU]] character.]]

A list of events in '''2001''' related to ''Star Wars''.

==January==
*[[January 1|01]] – [[Star Wars Insider 51|''Star Wars Insider'' 51]] published.
*[[January 3|03]] – [[Cherriielle]] is born.
*[[January 10|10]] – [[Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika 2|''Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika'' 2]] published.
*10 – [[Star Wars: Chewbacca (Dark Horse TPB)|''Star Wars: Chewbacca'' trade paperback]] published.
*[[January 30|30]] – ''[[Darth Maul: Shadow Hunter]]'' released.
*[[January 31|31]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 26|''Star Wars'' (1998) 26]] published.
*?? – ''[[Eye of the Sun trilogy]]'' published.
** – ''[[A Cularin Presence]]''
** – ''[[The Resistance Within]]''
** – ''[[A Revelation]]''
** – ''[[An Uneasy Peace]]'' {{C|associated interactive}}

==February==
*[[February 1|01]] – ''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Evil Experiment]]'' published.
*[[February 15|15]] – ''[[Darth Maul: Saboteur]]'' published.
*[[February 19|19]] – [[Star Wars: Starfighter (video game)|''Star Wars: Starfighter'']] released.
*[[February 21|21]] – ''[[Star Wars: Starfighter: Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]'' published.
*21 – [[Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: Last Stand on Ord Mantell 2|''Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: Last Stand on Ord Mantell'' 2]] published.
*[[February 27|27]] – [[Star Wars Insider 52|''Star Wars Insider'' 52]] published.
*[[February 28|28]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 27|''Star Wars'' (1998) 27]] published.
*?? – [[Secrets of Naboo|''Secrets of Naboo Campaign Pack'']] published.
*?? – [[Star Wars Gamer 2|''Star Wars Gamer'' 2]] published.
*?? – ''[[The Price of Business]]'' published.

==March==
*[[March 7|07]] – [[Star Wars Tales 7|''Star Wars Tales'' 7]] published.
*[[March 11|11]] – ''[[Star Wars: Episode I: Battle for Naboo]]'' released on [[Wikipedia:Personal computer|PC]].
*[[March 14|14]] – [[Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika 3|''Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika'' 3]] published.
*15 – ''[[Damsel in Distress]]'' published online.
*[[March 16|16]] – [[Star Wars Insider 53|''Star Wars Insider'' 53]] is released for subscribers.
*[[March 21|21]] – [[Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: Last Stand on Ord Mantell 3|''Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: Last Stand on Ord Mantell'' 3]] published.
*[[March 28|28]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 28|''Star Wars'' (1998) 28]] published.
*?? – ''[[Living Force Campaign Guide]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[TopWorld]]'' part one of ''[[Between the Worlds trilogy]]'' published.

==April==
*[[April 1|01]] – ''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Dangerous Rescue]]'' published.
*01 – [[Star Wars Insider 53|''Star Wars Insider'' 53]] is published.
*[[April 3|03]] – ''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]'' published.
*03 – [[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']] published.
*[[April 4|04]] – [[Star Wars: Republic: Outlander (TPB)|''Star Wars: Republic: Outlander'' trade paperback]] published.
*[[April 17|17]] – [[Star Wars Gamer 3|''Star Wars Gamer'' 3]] published.
*[[April 18|18]] – [[Jedi vs. Sith 1|''Jedi vs. Sith'' 1]] published.
*[[April 25|25]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 29|''Star Wars'' (1998) 29]] published.
*25 – [[Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika 4|''Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika'' 4]] published.
*?? – ''[[MidWorld]]'' part two of ''[[Between the Worlds trilogy]]'' published.

==May==
*[[May 2|02]] – [[Star Wars Infinities: A New Hope 1|''Star Wars Infinities: A New Hope'' 1]] published.
*[[May 4|04]]-[[May 6|06]] – The third [[Star Wars Weekends|''Star Wars'' Weekends]] event begins at [[Disney's Hollywood Studios|Disney-MGM Studios]].
*[[May 11|11]]-[[May 13|13]] – ''Star Wars'' Weekends continues at Disney-MGM Studios.
*[[May 16|16]] – [[Jedi vs. Sith 2|''Jedi vs. Sith'' 2]] published.
*[[May 18|18]] – [[Star Wars Insider 54|''Star Wars Insider'' 54]] released for subscribers.
*18-[[May 20|20]], [[May 25|25]]-[[May 27|27]] – ''Star Wars'' Weekends continues at Disney-MGM Studios.
*[[May 29|29]] – ''[[Cloak of Deception]]'' published.
*[[May 30|30]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 30|''Star Wars'' (1998) 30]] published.
*?? – [[Dark Horse Extra|''Dark Horse Extra'' issue 35]] begins [[Heart of Fire (comic story)|''Heart of Fire'']], finishes in July.
*?? – ''[[Secrets of Tatooine]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[Rogue Planet]]'' published in paperback.
*?? – ''[[UnderWorld]]'' part three of ''[[Between the Worlds trilogy]]'' published.

==June==
*[[June 6|06]] – [[Jedi Council: Acts of War (TPB)|''Jedi Council: Acts of War'' trade paperback]] published.
*06 – [[Star Wars Infinities: A New Hope 2|''Star Wars Infinities: A New Hope'' 2]] published.
*[[June 14|14]] – [[Star Wars Insider 54|''Star Wars Insider'' 54]] published.
*[[June 13|13]] – [[Star Wars Tales 8|''Star Wars Tales'' 8]] published.
*[[June 19|19]] – [[Star Wars Gamer 4|''Star Wars Gamer'' 4]] published.
*[[June 20|20]] – [[Jedi vs. Sith 3|''Jedi vs. Sith'' 3]] published.
*20 – [[Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika 5|''Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika'' 5]] published.
*[[June 21|21]] – ''[[A Night at Tosche Station]]'' published online.
*[[June 27|27]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 31|''Star Wars'' (1998) 31]] published.
*?? – ''[[Head in the Clouds]]'' episode one of ''[[Clouds of Genarius trilogy]]'' published.

==July==
*[[July 1|01]] – ''[[Jedi Apprentice Special Edition: Deceptions]]'' published.
*[[July 15|15]] – [[Tom Chantrell]] dies.
*[[July 18|18]] – [[Jedi vs. Sith 4|''Jedi vs. Sith'' 4]] published.
*[[July 20|20]] – [[Star Wars Insider 55|''Star Wars Insider'' 55]] released for subscribers.
*[[July 24|24]] – [[Star Wars Gamer 5|''Star Wars Gamer'' 5]] published.
*[[July 25|25]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 32|''Star Wars'' (1998) 32]] published.
*[[July 31|31]] – ''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[Clouded Paths]]'' episode two of ''[[Clouds of Genarius trilogy]]'' published.

==August==
*[[August 1|01]] – ''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Ties That Bind]]'' published.
*[[August 2|02]] – ''[[The Dark Side Sourcebook]]'' published.
*02–[[August 5|05]] – [[Gen Con Game Fair 2001]] was held in Milwaukee, Wisconsin.
*[[August 7|07]] – [[Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide (real-life book)|''Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide'']] published.
*07 – [[Star Wars Insider 55|''Star Wars Insider'' 55]] published.
*[[August 9|09]] – ''[[Signal Interruption]]'' published at [[Wizards.com]].
*[[August 14|14]] – [[Star Wars Gamer 6|''Star Wars Gamer'' 6]] shipped to subscribers.
*[[August 15|15]] – [[Jedi vs. Sith 5|''Jedi vs. Sith'' 5]] published.
*[[August 22|22]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 33|''Star Wars'' (1998) 33]] published.
*?? – ''[[Into the Storm Clouds]]'' episode three of ''[[Clouds of Genarius trilogy]]'' published.

==September==
*[[September 1|01]] – ''[[Jedi Quest: Path to Truth]]'' published.
*[[September 4|04]] – [[Star Wars Gamer 6|''Star Wars Gamer'' 6]] published at newsstands.
*[[September 5|05]] – [[Star Wars: Republic: Emissaries to Malastare (TPB)|''Star Wars: Republic: Emissaries to Malastare'' trade paperback]] published.
*[[September 11|11]] – [[Star Wars Insider 56|''Star Wars Insider'' 56]] released for subscribers.
*[[September 12|12]] – [[Jedi Quest 1|''Jedi Quest'' 1]] published.
*13 – ''[[The Fall of Cloud City]]'' published at [[Wizards.com]].
*[[September 14|14]] – [[Wikipedia:Nintendo GameCube|Nintendo GameCube]] is launched.
*[[September 19|19]] – [[Jedi vs. Sith 6|''Jedi vs. Sith'' 6]] published.
*19 – [[Star Wars Infinities: A New Hope 3|''Star Wars Infinities: A New Hope'' 3]] published.
*[[September 22|22]] – ''[[Rebellion Era Sourcebook]]'' published.
*[[September 26|26]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 34|''Star Wars'' (1998) 34]] published.
*?? – ''[[Depths of Dorumaa]]'' episode one of ''[[Broken Orbits trilogy]]'' published.

==October==
*[[October 1|01]] – [[Ted Burnett]] dies.
*01 – ''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Death of Hope]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[The New Jedi Order: Recovery]]'' eBook published.
*[[October 2|02]] – [[Star Wars Insider 56|''Star Wars Insider'' 56]] published.
*[[October 3|03]] – [[Tag & Bink Are Dead 1|''Tag & Bink Are Dead'' 1]] published.
*[[October 10|10]] – [[Star Wars Tales 9|''Star Wars Tales'' 9]] published.
*10 – [[Jedi Quest 2|''Jedi Quest'' 2]] published.
*[[October 16|16]] – [[Star Wars Gamer 7|''Star Wars Gamer'' 7]] shipped to subscribers.
*[[October 24|24]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 35|''Star Wars'' (1998) 35]] published.
*[[October 30|30]] – ''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[Alien Anthology]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[Something Uffel]]'' episode two of ''[[Broken Orbits trilogy]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[Ultimate Core Dump]]'' published.

==November==
*[[November 1|1]] – [[Anne Polland]] dies.
*[[November 9|9]] – [[Sage Groves]] is born.
*[[November 13|13]] – ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' released on [[Wikipedia:Personal computer|PC]].
*[[November 14|14]] – [[Jedi Quest 3|''Jedi Quest'' 3]] published.
*[[November 16|16]] – [[Star Wars Insider 57|''Star Wars Insider'' 57]] is released for subscribers.
*16 – [[Star Wars Gamer 7|''Star Wars Gamer'' 7]] published at newsstands.
*[[November 18|18]] – [[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron II: Rogue Leader|''Rogue Squadron II: Rogue Leader'']] released on the [[Wikipedia:Nintendo GameCube|Nintendo GameCube]] platform.
*[[November 21|21]] – [[Star Wars Infinities: A New Hope 4|''Star Wars Infinities: A New Hope'' 4]] published.
*21 – [[Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika (TPB)|''Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika'' trade paperback]] released.
*[[November 28|28]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 36|''Star Wars'' (1998) 36]] published.
*[[November 30|30]] – [[Fraser Kelly]] is born.
*30 – ''[[Starships of the Galaxy]]'' released.
*?? – ''[[Tilnes Rising]]'' episode three of ''[[Broken Orbits trilogy]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[The Wildlife of Star Wars: A Field Guide]]'' published.
*?? – [[Esther-Rose McGregor]] is born.

==December==
*[[December 1|01]] – ''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Call to Vengeance]]'' published.
*[[December 4|04]] – [[Star Wars Insider 57|''Star Wars Insider'' 57]] published.
*[[December 5|05]] – [[Tag & Bink Are Dead 2|''Tag & Bink Are Dead'' 2]] published.
*[[December 12|12]] – [[Francis Batsoni]] dies.
*12 – [[Jedi Quest 4|''Jedi Quest'' 4]] published.
*12 – [[Star Wars Tales 10|''Star Wars Tales'' 10]] published.
*[[December 19|19]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 37|''Star Wars'' (1998) 37]] published.
*19 – ''[[Star Wars: Obi-Wan]]'' released on the [[Wikipedia:Xbox|Xbox]] platform.
*19 – ''[[Star Wars: Republic: Twilight (TPB)]]'' published.
*[[December 21|21]] – [[Star Wars Gamer 8|''Star Wars Gamer'' 8]] shipped to subscribers.
*[[December 27|27]] – [[The Official Star Wars Fact File 1|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 1]] published.
*[[December 31|31]] – [[Decipher, Inc.|Decipher]] stops production of [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game]]
*?? – ''[[Oblivion's Kiss]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[Starships of the Galaxy]]'' published.

==Unknown==
*[[Chris Chalenor]] dies.
*''[[Flames of Rebellion]]'' stand-alone adventure released.
**''[[Trade War trilogy]]'' published.
***''[[Consignment]]''
***''[[Mix and Match]]''
***''[[Find the Lady]]''
